Class OpenAiResponse

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.Response<OpenAiModelMessage>
uno.anahata.asi.openai.OpenAiResponse
public class OpenAiResponse extends Response<OpenAiModelMessage>
Specialized Response implementation for the OpenAI Responses API.

Aggregates the entire 'output' array from a Responses API call into a single turn (one OpenAiModelMessage). Maps API usage metadata and orchestrates the item-by-item processing of the model's output.

Author:
anahata

  • Constructor Details

    • OpenAiResponse

      public OpenAiResponse(String requestConfigJson, String historyJson, String chunkJson)
      Constructs a new response object for a streaming chunk.
      Parameters:
      requestConfigJson - The raw JSON of the request configuration.
      historyJson - The raw JSON of the conversation history.
      chunkJson - The raw JSON of the stream chunk.

    • OpenAiResponse

      public OpenAiResponse(String requestConfigJson, String historyJson, Agi agi, String modelId, String responseBody) throws Exception
      Constructs a new full response by parsing the OpenAI response body.
      Parameters:
      requestConfigJson - The configuration partition.
      historyJson - The history partition.
      agi - The parent AGI session.
      modelId - The expected model ID.
      responseBody - The raw API response body.
      Throws:
      Exception - on parsing failures.

  • Method Details

    • getPromptFeedback

      public Optional<String> getPromptFeedback()
      Gets the prompt feedback message, which explains why the prompt was blocked, if applicable.
      Specified by:
      getPromptFeedback in class Response<OpenAiModelMessage>
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the block reason message, or empty if not blocked.

    • getTotalTokenCount

      public int getTotalTokenCount()
      Gets the total number of tokens for the entire interaction (prompt + all candidates).
      Specified by:
      getTotalTokenCount in class Response<OpenAiModelMessage>
      Returns:
      The total token count.
